purpose: Register production-representative sandbox projects into EvoPilot for release coverage matrix loops.

coverageMatrixSeed.requiredEvidence: POST /api/v1/projects plus GET /api/v1/projects shows every representative project as VERIFIED
Jenkins job exists and reaches terminal status for every representative project
Each representative project has a real Git repository and reachable SCM metadata
Target product uses the configured real GLM provider during lifecycle planning or remediation
EvoPilot product-native release decision includes representative projects and terminal criteria
